headline: HCA Healthcare (HCA) Is Down 6.8% After Q1 EBITDA Miss And Workforce Cuts Are Announced
summary: In recent months, HCA Healthcare has reported weaker-than-expected Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA amid cost pressures and workforce reductions, even as it continued investing in stroke care quality, community initiatives, and new facilities like the HCA Florida Gainesville Hospital. These developments highlight a tension between HCA Healthcare's operational and community expansion efforts and investor concerns about expenses, regulatory headwinds, and the impact of non-clinical layoffs on future...
